The '''Mark III Powersuit''' was a [[Power armor/Legends|powersuit]] and upgrade to the [[Mark II Powersuit]]. The suit was specialized for use by local militias and security personnel. The suit was equipped with a [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannon]] and miniature [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] launcher. The suit was developed by [[Telgorn Corporation/Legends|Telgorn Corporation]].<ref name="EJ" />

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=The Evacuation of Jatee|book=Supernova (sourcebook)}}
